title: Intense Peppery Greek Tuna Tzatziki Bowl
description: A midnight‑craving Greek bowl packed with peppery tzatziki, seared tuna, and crunchy sesame seeds, served in a single dish for a quick pescatarian delight.
instructions: Whisk Greek yogurt with lemon zest, lemon juice, minced garlic, red pepper flakes, black pepper, oregano, and a pinch of salt in a bowl until smooth.
Stir grated cucumber into the yogurt mixture, pressing lightly to remove excess moisture.
Heat a tava‑griddle over medium‑high heat, drizzle a teaspoon of olive oil, then lay the drained tuna in a single layer; sear for 2 minutes each side until lightly browned.
Transfer the seared tuna to a serving bowl and top with the peppery tzatziki.
Sprinkle toasted sesame seeds over the bowl for crunch.
Let the bowl rest for 5 minutes to allow flavors to meld before serving.
Serve immediately with toasted pita or crusty bread if desired.
